prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document applies to Scotland as the Housing and Regeneration Act 2008 is a UK-wide piece of legislation that encompasses housing regulations across all nations, including Scotland. The provisions regarding inspections of registered providers of social housing are relevant to the operational framework within Scotland's housing sector.
